import React from "react"; import { Quote } from "lucide-react"; export default function Founder() { return (
{/* LEFT COLUMN: Headline & Quote */}
About the Founder

A superintendent's eye.
A craftsman's hands.

“A lot of residential contractors operate by the seat of their pants. We run our renovations like a commercial site: Strict schedules, tight budgets, flawless execution, no surprises.”

— Justin Carinci
{/* RIGHT COLUMN: The Bio & Stats */}

Justin Carinci

Founder, Sunwest Builds

{/* The 3-Paragraph Bio tailored exactly to his buddy's structure */}

Justin holds an Advanced Diploma in Construction Engineering & Management from George Brown College and has been working in the construction sector for over a decade. After graduating, he obtained pivotal roles as a Project Manager and Site Supervisor, overseeing multi-million dollar high-rise towers for reputable developers including Menkes, Solmar, and Tribute Communities.

Through many years managing complex, high-stakes projects, Justin has built a great reputation with various consultants, architects, engineers, designers, sub-trades, and mentors. This elite network and enterprise-level discipline have directly contributed to his success in the residential custom home and structural renovation sector.

Anyone who knows Justin knows that he is highly organized, detail-oriented, and meticulous like no other—from consultant and client communications, to emails, all the way to how pristine the sites are kept. These are just a few of the traits he holds, fostering trust with his clients and building success in this industry.

{/* Credentials / Stats */}
{[ ["Experience", "10+ Years Corporate"], ["Education", "George Brown College"], ["Specialty", "Structural Finishing"], ["Network", "Elite Sub-trades"], ["Region", "GTA & Surroundings"], ["Approach", "Owner On-Site"], ].map(([k, v]) => (
{k}
{v}
))}
); }
